description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front facade features a combination of white and dark gray surfaces, a prominent garage door, and a small entryway with steps leading up to the main entrance. The property is bordered by a low stone wall and landscaped with a few trees and shrubs, set on a rectangular green lawn. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and clean, uninterrupted wall surfaces. The roof is flat and appears to be constructed from a dark material, contrasting with the lighter walls. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, and minimalist landscaping. Features a garage, entry steps, and clean geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, steps, and landscaped yard with trees and a low stone wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, driveway, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain walls, minimal fenestration, and a clear view of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the building, driveway, and simple landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
